content.en:
All of Ye Tian's duplicate bodies inside the Mist Mother Fruit exploded and died, making it impossible for the Mist Mother True Stone to lock it anymore.

"The other party is very simple, and he commits suicide directly!"

"It should be a clone of some existence, otherwise it wouldn't be so straightforward and decisive. "

"Even if you deal with the doppelganger and commit suicide, you have to find ~ the other party's body!"

"Go out with the Mist Mother Stone and look for traces of the other side. "

Soon.

A fourth-realm existence of the super-dimensional elf clan walked out of the super-dimensional elf clan with the Mist Mother True Stone in hand, and he was about to urge the Mist Mother True Stone to lock Ye Tian's true god.

But at this moment, a terrifying aura locked onto this fourth realm superdimensional elf clan.

Sensing the breath of the other party, the fourth realm of the extradimensional elves was so frightened that they immediately returned to the territory.

......

Terran Temple.

Ye Tian shuddered, because just now, he felt as if he was about to be locked by something.

He knew very well that his copy body in the Fruit of the Fog Mother of the Extradimensional Elves had been discovered, and the body of the outside world would also be locked.

Once the other party comes out, look for his traces, and really be able to find out all his copy bodies.

So, he was a little flustered.

Although he hid a replica body in the Kuntong Realm Lord Ruins, that ruins might not be able to hide it!

The background of the super-dimensional elf clan is too terrifying, the ruins of the third realm are really nothing, if it is the extra-dimensional realm of the fourth realm, holding a high-level super-dimensional dao soldier such as tracking, he can find him.

So, this is the closest he has come to death.

But.

Time passed slowly, and he didn't feel any trace of the extradimensional elves.

"The extradimensional elves shouldn't be unable to find me, they must not dare to come out to find me!"

Ye Tian thought about it like this and breathed a sigh of relief.

The extra-dimensional elf clan is so powerful, but the clansmen have been staying in that void territory, that void territory seems to be very large, but compared to the strength of the extradimensional elves, it seems slightly smaller.

If the extra-dimensional elves expand their territory to the outside world, occupy many territories, and obtain more resources, they can definitely make the strength of the clan improve rapidly, and they will cultivate more powerhouses in the second and third realms.

But the extra-dimensional elves did not do this, and it is likely that many powerful extra-dimensional forces have been staring at the super-dimensional elves.

And this has become his vitality.

"This time it's a bit reckless, copying the body seems to be very powerful, but it's not difficult for those powerful extra-dimensional realms to lock me to copy all the bodies, and if I really provoke those powerful forces, I can't escape. "

Ye Tian thought so.

After this time, he was ready to keep a low profile, and he couldn't continue to do this, otherwise one failure would be a fall, and a complete fall.

Unless he can completely cover his copy body, so that those powerhouses of the third and fourth realms will not be able to track him.

But how hard it is to do this!

Right now, the crisis is over, and he is ready to copy the extradimensional talent.

His copying talent has been transformed to the level of extradimensional talent, so he can copy other extradimensional talents, and even fuse them to fuse more powerful extradimensional talents.

And he had seen a lot of extradimensional creatures in the past years, and now he could copy these extradimensional talents.

Soon.

The first extradimensional talent was fused.

【Super Dimensional Talent Speed (Extreme)】

This represents a superdimensional talent such as speed, and has reached the limit of an extradimensional talent.

With the passage of time, a door of extra-dimensional talent was fused, which also made Ye Tian's physical body stronger and higher, and his talent became higher and higher, and his potential far surpassed those extra-dimensional creatures.

After a long time, Ye Tian's super-dimensional talents had been exhausted, and they had all reached the extreme level.

At the same time, his talent has reached incredible levels.

"The physical body is ten times stronger, this is one of the benefits of the transformation of talent!"

It can be said that his current physical body has surpassed the physical strength of the same level as the top extradimensional creatures.

Subsequently, he cultivated for a while and found that his cultivation speed had increased by at least dozens or even hundreds of times, and his cultivation speed would be very fast in the future, which was also one of the benefits.

In addition, his comprehension has also skyrocketed dozens of times, and it will be easier to comprehend the extradimensional rules in the future.

Ye Tian said excitedly.

If he didn't have the talent to transform, it would be easy for him to break through to the second realm, but it would be slightly more difficult to break through to the third realm, and it would be even more difficult to hit the fourth realm.

But now, he is not worried about the future.

"If I had completed the talent transformation earlier, and then used the soul pupil to comprehend the core of the Fog Mother, then my current superdimensional rule realm would far surpass the present. "

Ye Tian didn't regret it, after all, it was already good to be able to complete the talent transformation.

......

Six Thousand Territory.

The Realm of Garan.

This is the extradimensional realm where the headquarters of the Garan Chamber of Commerce is located, and it is also named after Garan, which shows the status of the Garan Chamber of Commerce in this extradimensional realm.

A replica body of Ye Tian came here, and he wanted to come to the headquarters of the Jialan Chamber of Commerce to see if there was anything he needed.

Soon.

Ye Tian met a superdimensional realm of the Jialan Chamber of Commerce, the Nine Pastures Realm Master.

"Ye Tian Realm Lord, what treasures do you want to buy when you come to my Jialan Chamber of Commerce?" asked the Nine Mu Realm Lord. []

Ye Tian asked directly: "Nine Mu Realm Lord, is there any treasure that can cover the technique of tracking and deduction?" "

"There are treasures of this kind, what are the requirements of the Ye Tian Realm Lord?" said the Nine Mu Realm Lord.

"Is there a treasure that covers the tracking of the Fourth Realm?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Could it be that the Ye Tian Realm Lord has provoked the existence of the Fourth Realm?" the Nine Mu Realm Lord was taken aback.

"Of course not. Ye Tian shook his head, "If I provoke the Fourth Realm, I still have a chance to come here?"

"That's just as well!"

The Lord of the Nine Pastoral Realm breathed a sigh of relief, if it really involved the Fourth Realm and provoked such an existence, the entire Garan Chamber of Commerce would be destroyed!

"Lord Ye Tian Realm, our Jialan Chamber of Commerce doesn't have any treasures that can cover the deduction of the powerhouses of the Fourth Realm, this is too difficult. The Nine Pastoral Realm Lord shook his head.

"Does the Nagaran Chamber of Commerce have any news on this?"

Ye Tian asked again.

"This is really not clear, I'm going to ask other high-level officials of the Chamber of Commerce. "

Subsequently, the Nine Pastures Realm Lord went to inquire.

Soon after, the Nine Pastures Realm Lord returned and brought a document.

"Ye Tian Realm Lord, this is a way to conceal the deduction and tracking of the powerhouses of the Fourth Realm, although it can't be done, but you can understand it, the price is not high, 100 million Galanbao coins are enough. "

The Nine Pasture Realm Lord handed this information to Ye Tian, and Ye Tian also paid 100 million Galanbao coins.
